name: stellate_cluster_chrX_12E
description: Stellate gene cluster on X at 12E. Tandem array of ~30-150 nearly identical Stellate genes encoding a beta-subunit-of-CK2-like protein. Normally silenced by Su(Ste) piRNAs from chrY. In cry/cry+ males the silencing fails and Stellate crystals form. One of the cleanest examples of a piRNA-targeted satellite-protein-coding hybrid.
expected_copy_count: ~30-150 tandem Stellate copies (highly variable across strains)
